title: YaBoi's Elytra
description: I retetxured Elytra for the hell of it!
body:
Ever thought the Elytra looked bland but wanted something in-theme with actual real-life insect elytron? Well me too, and then I remembered that I could make resource packs and here we are. I even made it look like it's made of Purpur and Phantom Membrane :D

![The retextured Elytra Wings on an armor stand, in an item frame, and a broken variant inside another item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/342868ca0a6787382b68ba99f9538a31b42b415b.png)

on an unrelated note, why do vanilla Elytra have such weird models?? like they're full on rectangular prisms but _at least_ 3 sides have absolutely _no_ textures??? it even _**renders the backface**_ instead of having none like most models???????? wth mojang
